verses.esv: To the tribe of Levi alone Moses gave no inheritance. The offerings by fire to the LORD God of Israel are their inheritance, as he said to him.
verses.kjv: Only unto the tribe of Levi he gave none inheritance; the sacrifices of the Lord God of Israel made by fire are their inheritance, as he said unto them.
verses.bsb: To the tribe of Levi, however, Moses had given no inheritance. The offerings made by fire to the LORD, the God of Israel, are their inheritance, just as He had promised them.

verses.esv: And Moses gave an inheritance to the tribe of the people of Reuben according to their clans.
verses.kjv: ¶ And Moses gave unto the tribe of the children of Reuben inheritance according to their families.
verses.bsb: This is what Moses had given to the clans of the tribe of Reuben:

verses.esv: So their territory was from Aroer, which is on the edge of the Valley of the Arnon, and the city that is in the middle of the valley, and all the tableland by Medeba;
verses.kjv: And their coast was from Aroer, that is on the bank of the river Arnon, and the city that is in the midst of the river, and all the plain by Medeba;
verses.bsb: The territory from Aroer on the rim of the Arnon Valley, along with the city in the middle of the valley, to the whole plateau beyond Medeba,

verses.esv: with Heshbon, and all its cities that are in the tableland; Dibon, and Bamoth-baal, and Beth-baal-meon,
verses.kjv: Heshbon, and all her cities that are in the plain; Dibon, and Bamoth-baal, and Beth-baal-meon,
verses.bsb: to Heshbon and all its cities on the plateau, including Dibon, Bamoth-baal, Beth-baal-meon,

verses.esv: and Jahaz, and Kedemoth, and Mephaath,
verses.kjv: And Jahazah, and Kedemoth, and Mephaath,
verses.bsb: Jahaz, Kedemoth, Mephaath,

verses.esv: and Kiriathaim, and Sibmah, and Zereth-shahar on the hill of the valley,
verses.kjv: And Kirjathaim, and Sibmah, and Zareth-shahar in the mount of the valley,
verses.bsb: Kiriathaim, Sibmah, Zereth-shahar on the hill in the valley,

verses.esv: and Beth-peor, and the slopes of Pisgah, and Beth-jeshimoth,
verses.kjv: And Beth-peor, and Ashdoth-pisgah, and Beth-jeshimoth,
verses.bsb: Beth-peor, the slopes of Pisgah, and Beth-jeshimoth—

verses.esv: that is, all the cities of the tableland, and all the kingdom of Sihon king of the Amorites, who reigned in Heshbon, whom Moses defeated with the leaders of Midian, Evi and Rekem and Zur and Hur and Reba, the princes of Sihon, who lived in the land.
verses.kjv: And all the cities of the plain, and all the kingdom of Sihon king of the Amorites, which reigned in Heshbon, whom Moses smote with the princes of Midian, Evi, and Rekem, and Zur, and Hur, and Reba, which were dukes of Sihon, dwelling in the country.
verses.bsb: all the cities of the plateau and all the kingdom of Sihon king of the Amorites, who reigned in Heshbon until Moses killed him and the chiefs of Midian (Evi, Rekem, Zur, Hur, and Reba), the princes of Sihon who lived in the land.

verses.esv: Balaam also, the son of Beor, the one who practiced divination, was killed with the sword by the people of Israel among the rest of their slain.
verses.kjv: ¶ Balaam also the son of Beor, the soothsayer, did the children of Israel slay with the sword among them that were slain by them.
verses.bsb: The Israelites also killed the diviner Balaam son of Beor along with the others they put to the sword.

verses.esv: And the border of the people of Reuben was the Jordan as a boundary. This was the inheritance of the people of Reuben, according to their clans with their cities and villages.
verses.kjv: And the border of the children of Reuben was Jordan, and the border thereof. This was the inheritance of the children of Reuben after their families, the cities and the villages thereof.
verses.bsb: And the border of the Reubenites was the bank of the Jordan.   This was the inheritance of the clans of the Reubenites, including the cities and villages.

verses.esv: Moses gave an inheritance also to the tribe of Gad, to the people of Gad, according to their clans.
verses.kjv: And Moses gave inheritance unto the tribe of Gad, even unto the children of Gad according to their families.
verses.bsb: This is what Moses had given to the clans of the tribe of Gad:

verses.esv: Their territory was Jazer, and all the cities of Gilead, and half the land of the Ammonites, to Aroer, which is east of Rabbah,
verses.kjv: And their coast was Jazer, and all the cities of Gilead, and half the land of the children of Ammon, unto Aroer that is before Rabbah;
verses.bsb: The territory of Jazer, all the cities of Gilead, and half the land of the Ammonites as far as Aroer, near Rabbah;

verses.esv: and from Heshbon to Ramath-mizpeh and Betonim, and from Mahanaim to the territory of Debir,
verses.kjv: And from Heshbon unto Ramath-mizpeh, and Betonim; and from Mahanaim unto the border of Debir;
verses.bsb: the territory from Heshbon to Ramath-mizpeh and Betonim, and from Mahanaim to the border of Debir;

verses.esv: and in the valley Beth-haram, Beth-nimrah, Succoth, and Zaphon, the rest of the kingdom of Sihon king of Heshbon, having the Jordan as a boundary, to the lower end of the Sea of Chinnereth, eastward beyond the Jordan.
verses.kjv: And in the valley, Beth-aram, and Beth-nimrah, and Succoth, and Zaphon, the rest of the kingdom of Sihon king of Heshbon, Jordan and his border, even unto the edge of the sea of Chinnereth on the other side Jordan eastward.
verses.bsb: and in the valley, Beth-haram, Beth-nimrah, Succoth, and Zaphon, with the rest of the kingdom of Sihon king of Heshbon (the territory on the east side of the Jordan up to the edge of the Sea of Chinnereth).

verses.esv: This is the inheritance of the people of Gad according to their clans, with their cities and villages.
verses.kjv: This is the inheritance of the children of Gad after their families, the cities, and their villages.
verses.bsb: This was the inheritance of the clans of the Gadites, including the cities and villages.

verses.esv: And Moses gave an inheritance to the half-tribe of Manasseh. It was allotted to the half-tribe of the people of Manasseh according to their clans.
verses.kjv: ¶ And Moses gave inheritance unto the half tribe of Manasseh: and this was the possession of the half tribe of the children of Manasseh by their families.
verses.bsb: This is what Moses had given to the clans of the half-tribe of Manasseh, that is, to half the tribe of the descendants of Manasseh:

verses.esv: Their region extended from Mahanaim, through all Bashan, the whole kingdom of Og king of Bashan, and all the towns of Jair, which are in Bashan, sixty cities,
verses.kjv: And their coast was from Mahanaim, all Bashan, all the kingdom of Og king of Bashan, and all the towns of Jair, which are in Bashan, threescore cities:
verses.bsb: The territory from Mahanaim through all Bashan—all the kingdom of Og king of Bashan, including all the towns of Jair that are in Bashan, sixty cities;

verses.esv: and half Gilead, and Ashtaroth, and Edrei, the cities of the kingdom of Og in Bashan. These were allotted to the people of Machir the son of Manasseh for the half of the people of Machir according to their clans.
verses.kjv: And half Gilead, and Ashtaroth, and Edrei, cities of the kingdom of Og in Bashan, were pertaining unto the children of Machir the son of Manasseh, even to the one half of the children of Machir by their families.
verses.bsb: half of Gilead; and Ashtaroth and Edrei, the royal cities of Og in Bashan.  All this was for the clans of the descendants of Machir son of Manasseh, that is, half of the descendants of Machir.

verses.esv: These are the inheritances that Moses distributed in the plains of Moab, beyond the Jordan east of Jericho.
verses.kjv: These are the countries which Moses did distribute for inheritance in the plains of Moab, on the other side Jordan, by Jericho, eastward.
verses.bsb: These were the portions Moses had given them on the plains of Moab beyond the Jordan, east of Jericho.

verses.esv: But to the tribe of Levi Moses gave no inheritance; the LORD God of Israel is their inheritance, just as he said to them.
verses.kjv: But unto the tribe of Levi Moses gave not any inheritance: the Lord God of Israel was their inheritance, as he said unto them.
verses.bsb: To the tribe of Levi, however, Moses had given no inheritance. The LORD, the God of Israel, is their inheritance, just as He had promised them.

verses.esv: These are the inheritances that the people of Israel received in the land of Canaan, which Eleazar the priest and Joshua the son of Nun and the heads of the fathers' houses of the tribes of the people of Israel gave them to inherit.
verses.kjv: AND these are the countries which the children of Israel inherited in the land of Canaan, which Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun, and the heads of the fathers of the tribes of the children of Israel, distributed for inheritance to them.
verses.bsb: Now these are the portions that the Israelites inherited in the land of Canaan, as distributed by Eleazar the priest, Joshua son of Nun, and the heads of the families of the tribes of Israel.

verses.esv: Their inheritance was by lot, just as the LORD had commanded by the hand of Moses for the nine and one-half tribes.
verses.kjv: By lot was their inheritance, as the Lord commanded by the hand of Moses, for the nine tribes, and for the half tribe.
verses.bsb: Their inheritance was assigned by lot for the nine and a half tribes, as the LORD had commanded through Moses.

verses.esv: For Moses had given an inheritance to the two and one-half tribes beyond the Jordan, but to the Levites he gave no inheritance among them.
verses.kjv: For Moses had given the inheritance of two tribes and an half tribe on the other side Jordan: but unto the Levites he gave none inheritance among them.
verses.bsb: For Moses had given the inheritance east of the Jordan to the other two and a half tribes. But he granted no inheritance among them to the Levites.

verses.esv: For the people of Joseph were two tribes, Manasseh and Ephraim. And no portion was given to the Levites in the land, but only cities to dwell in, with their pasturelands for their livestock and their substance.
verses.kjv: For the children of Joseph were two tribes, Manasseh and Ephraim: therefore they gave no part unto the Levites in the land, save cities to dwell in, with their suburbs for their cattle and for their substance.
verses.bsb: The descendants of Joseph became two tribes, Manasseh and Ephraim. And no portion of the land was given to the Levites, except for cities in which to live, along with pasturelands for their flocks and herds.

verses.esv: The people of Israel did as the LORD commanded Moses; they allotted the land.
verses.kjv: As the Lord commanded Moses, so the children of Israel did, and they divided the land.
verses.bsb: So the Israelites did as the LORD had commanded Moses, and they divided the land.

verses.esv: Then the people of Judah came to Joshua at Gilgal. And Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenizzite said to him, “You know what the LORD said to Moses the man of God in Kadesh-barnea concerning you and me.
verses.kjv: ¶ Then the children of Judah came unto Joshua in Gilgal: and Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenezite said unto him, Thou knowest the thing that the Lord said unto Moses the man of God concerning me and thee in Kadesh-barnea.
verses.bsb: Then the sons of Judah approached Joshua at Gilgal, and Caleb son of Jephunneh the Kenizzite said to him, “You know what the LORD said to Moses the man of God at Kadesh-barnea about you and me.

verses.esv: I was forty years old when Moses the servant of the LORD sent me from Kadesh-barnea to spy out the land, and I brought him word again as it was in my heart.
verses.kjv: Forty years old was I when Moses the servant of the Lord sent me from Kadesh-barnea to espy out the land; and I brought him word again as it was in mine heart.
verses.bsb: I was forty years old when Moses the servant of the LORD sent me from Kadesh-barnea to spy out the land, and I brought back to him an honest report.

verses.esv: But my brothers who went up with me made the heart of the people melt; yet I wholly followed the LORD my God.
verses.kjv: Nevertheless my brethren that went up with me made the heart of the people melt: but I wholly followed the Lord my God.
verses.bsb: Although my brothers who went with me made the hearts of the people melt with fear, I remained loyal to the LORD my God.

verses.esv: And Moses swore on that day, saying, ‘Surely the land on which your foot has trodden shall be an inheritance for you and your children forever, because you have wholly followed the LORD my God.’
verses.kjv: And Moses sware on that day, saying, Surely the land whereon thy feet have trodden shall be thine inheritance, and thy children’s for ever, because thou hast wholly followed the Lord my God.
verses.bsb: On that day Moses swore to me, saying, ‘Surely the land on which you have set foot will be an inheritance to you and your children forever, because you have wholly followed the LORD my God.’

verses.esv: And now, behold, the LORD has kept me alive, just as he said, these forty-five years since the time that the LORD spoke this word to Moses, while Israel walked in the wilderness. And now, behold, I am this day eighty-five years old.
verses.kjv: And now, behold, the Lord hath kept me alive, as he said, these forty and five years, even since the Lord spake this word unto Moses, while the children of Israel wandered in the wilderness: and now, lo, I am this day fourscore and five years old.
verses.bsb: Now behold, as the LORD promised, He has kept me alive these forty-five years since He spoke this word to Moses, while Israel wandered in the wilderness. So here I am today, eighty-five years old,

verses.esv: I am still as strong today as I was in the day that Moses sent me; my strength now is as my strength was then, for war and for going and coming.
verses.kjv: As yet I am as strong this day as I was in the day that Moses sent me: as my strength was then, even so is my strength now, for war, both to go out, and to come in.
verses.bsb: still as strong today as I was the day Moses sent me out. As my strength was then, so it is now for war, for going out, and for coming in.

verses.esv: So now give me this hill country of which the LORD spoke on that day, for you heard on that day how the Anakim were there, with great fortified cities. It may be that the LORD will be with me, and I shall drive them out just as the LORD said.”
verses.kjv: Now therefore give me this mountain, whereof the Lord spake in that day; for thou heardest in that day how the Anakims were there, and that the cities were great and fenced: if so be the Lord will be with me, then I shall be able to drive them out, as the Lord said.
verses.bsb: Now therefore give me this hill country that the LORD promised me on that day, for you yourself heard then that the Anakim were there, with great and fortified cities. Perhaps with the LORD’s help I will drive them out, as the LORD has spoken.”

verses.esv: Then Joshua blessed him, and he gave Hebron to Caleb the son of Jephunneh for an inheritance.
verses.kjv: And Joshua blessed him, and gave unto Caleb the son of Jephunneh Hebron for an inheritance.
verses.bsb: Then Joshua blessed Caleb son of Jephunneh and gave him Hebron as his inheritance.

verses.esv: Therefore Hebron became the inheritance of Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenizzite to this day, because he wholly followed the LORD, the God of Israel.
verses.kjv: Hebron therefore became the inheritance of Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenezite unto this day, because that he wholly followed the Lord God of Israel.
verses.bsb: Therefore Hebron belongs to Caleb son of Jephunneh the Kenizzite as an inheritance to this day, because he wholly followed the LORD, the God of Israel.

verses.esv: Now the name of Hebron formerly was Kiriath-arba. (Arba was the greatest man among the Anakim.) And the land had rest from war.
verses.kjv: And the name of Hebron before was Kirjath-arba; which Arba was a great man among the Anakims. And the land had rest from war.
verses.bsb: (Hebron used to be called Kiriath-arba, after Arba, the greatest man among the Anakim.)  Then the land had rest from war.

verses.esv: The allotment for the tribe of the people of Judah according to their clans reached southward to the boundary of Edom, to the wilderness of Zin at the farthest south.
verses.bsb: Now the allotment for the clans of the tribe of Judah extended to the border of Edom, to the Wilderness of Zin at the extreme southern boundary:

verses.esv: And their south boundary ran from the end of the Salt Sea, from the bay that faces southward.
verses.kjv: And their south border was from the shore of the salt sea, from the bay that looketh southward:
verses.bsb: Their southern border started at the bay on the southern tip of the Salt Sea,

verses.esv: It goes out southward of the ascent of Akrabbim, passes along to Zin, and goes up south of Kadesh-barnea, along by Hezron, up to Addar, turns about to Karka,
verses.kjv: And it went out to the south side to Maaleh-acrabbim, and passed along to Zin, and ascended up on the south side unto Kadesh-barnea, and passed along to Hezron, and went up to Adar, and fetched a compass to Karkaa:
verses.bsb: proceeded south of the Ascent of Akrabbim, continued on to Zin, went over to the south of Kadesh-barnea, ran past Hezron up to Addar, and curved toward Karka.

verses.esv: passes along to Azmon, goes out by the Brook of Egypt, and comes to its end at the sea. This shall be your south boundary.
verses.kjv: From thence it passed toward Azmon, and went out unto the river of Egypt; and the goings out of that coast were at the sea: this shall be your south coast.
verses.bsb: It proceeded to Azmon, joined the Brook of Egypt, and ended at the Sea. This was their southern border.

verses.esv: And the east boundary is the Salt Sea, to the mouth of the Jordan. And the boundary on the north side runs from the bay of the sea at the mouth of the Jordan.
verses.kjv: And the east border was the salt sea, even unto the end of Jordan. And their border in the north quarter was from the bay of the sea at the uttermost part of Jordan:
verses.bsb: The eastern border was the Salt Sea as far as the mouth of the Jordan.

verses.esv: And the boundary goes up to Beth-hoglah and passes along north of Beth-arabah. And the boundary goes up to the stone of Bohan the son of Reuben.
verses.kjv: And the border went up to Beth-hogla, and passed along by the north of Beth-arabah; and the border went up to the stone of Bohan the son of Reuben:
verses.bsb: The northern border started from the bay of the sea at the mouth of the Jordan, went up to Beth-hoglah, proceeded north of Beth-arabah, and went up to the Stone of Bohan son of Reuben.

verses.esv: And the boundary goes up to Debir from the Valley of Achor, and so northward, turning toward Gilgal, which is opposite the ascent of Adummim, which is on the south side of the valley. And the boundary passes along to the waters of En-shemesh and ends at En-rogel.
verses.kjv: And the border went up toward Debir from the valley of Achor, and so northward, looking toward Gilgal, that is before the going up to Adummim, which is on the south side of the river: and the border passed toward the waters of En-shemesh, and the goings out thereof were at En-rogel:
verses.bsb: Then the border went up to Debir from the Valley of Achor, turning north to Gilgal, which faces the Ascent of Adummim south of the ravine. It continued along the waters of En-shemesh and came out at En-rogel.

verses.esv: Then the boundary goes up by the Valley of the Son of Hinnom at the southern shoulder of the Jebusite (that is, Jerusalem). And the boundary goes up to the top of the mountain that lies over against the Valley of Hinnom, on the west, at the northern end of the Valley of Rephaim.
verses.kjv: And the border went up by the valley of the son of Hinnom unto the south side of the Jebusite; the same is Jerusalem: and the border went up to the top of the mountain that lieth before the valley of Hinnom westward, which is at the end of the valley of the giants northward:
verses.bsb: From there the border went up the Valley of Hinnom along the southern slope of the Jebusites (that is, Jerusalem) and ascended to the top of the hill that faces the Valley of Hinnom on the west, at the northern end of the Valley of Rephaim.

verses.esv: Then the boundary extends from the top of the mountain to the spring of the waters of Nephtoah, and from there to the cities of Mount Ephron. Then the boundary bends around to Baalah (that is, Kiriath-jearim).
verses.kjv: And the border was drawn from the top of the hill unto the fountain of the water of Nephtoah, and went out to the cities of mount Ephron; and the border was drawn to Baalah, which is Kirjath-jearim:
verses.bsb: From the hilltop the border curved to the spring of the Waters of Nephtoah, proceeded to the cities of Mount Ephron, and then bent around toward Baalah (that is, Kiriath-jearim).

verses.esv: And the boundary circles west of Baalah to Mount Seir, passes along to the northern shoulder of Mount Jearim (that is, Chesalon), and goes down to Beth-shemesh and passes along by Timnah.
verses.kjv: And the border compassed from Baalah westward unto mount Seir, and passed along unto the side of mount Jearim, which is Chesalon, on the north side, and went down to Beth-shemesh, and passed on to Timnah:
verses.bsb: The border curled westward from Baalah to Mount Seir, ran along the northern slope of Mount Jearim (that is, Chesalon), went down to Beth-shemesh, and crossed to Timnah.

verses.esv: The boundary goes out to the shoulder of the hill north of Ekron, then the boundary bends around to Shikkeron and passes along to Mount Baalah and goes out to Jabneel. Then the boundary comes to an end at the sea.
verses.kjv: And the border went out unto the side of Ekron northward: and the border was drawn to Shicron, and passed along to mount Baalah, and went out unto Jabneel; and the goings out of the border were at the sea.
verses.bsb: Then it went out to the northern slope of Ekron, curved toward Shikkeron, proceeded to Mount Baalah, went on to Jabneel, and ended at the Sea.

verses.esv: And the west boundary was the Great Sea with its coastline. This is the boundary around the people of Judah according to their clans.
verses.kjv: And the west border was to the great sea, and the coast thereof. This is the coast of the children of Judah round about according to their families.
verses.bsb: And the western border was the coastline of the Great Sea.   These are the boundaries around the clans of the descendants of Judah.

verses.esv: According to the commandment of the LORD to Joshua, he gave to Caleb the son of Jephunneh a portion among the people of Judah, Kiriath-arba, that is, Hebron (Arba was the father of Anak).
verses.kjv: ¶ And unto Caleb the son of Jephunneh he gave a part among the children of Judah, according to the commandment of the Lord to Joshua, even the city of Arba the father of Anak, which city is Hebron.
verses.bsb: According to the LORD’s command to him, Joshua gave Caleb son of Jephunneh a portion among the sons of Judah—Kiriath-arba, that is, Hebron. (Arba was the forefather of Anak.)

verses.esv: And Caleb drove out from there the three sons of Anak, Sheshai and Ahiman and Talmai, the descendants of Anak.
verses.kjv: And Caleb drove thence the three sons of Anak, Sheshai, and Ahiman, and Talmai, the children of Anak.
verses.bsb: And Caleb drove out from there the three sons of Anak—the descendants of Sheshai, Ahiman, and Talmai, the children of Anak.

verses.esv: And he went up from there against the inhabitants of Debir. Now the name of Debir formerly was Kiriath-sepher.
verses.kjv: And he went up thence to the inhabitants of Debir: and the name of Debir before was Kirjath-sepher.
verses.bsb: From there he marched against the inhabitants of Debir (formerly known as Kiriath-sepher).

verses.esv: And Caleb said, “Whoever strikes Kiriath-sepher and captures it, to him will I give Achsah my daughter as wife.”
verses.kjv: ¶ And Caleb said, He that smiteth Kirjath-sepher, and taketh it, to him will I give Achsah my daughter to wife.
verses.bsb: And Caleb said, “To the man who strikes down Kiriath-sepher and captures it, I will give my daughter Acsah in marriage.”

verses.esv: And Othniel the son of Kenaz, the brother of Caleb, captured it. And he gave him Achsah his daughter as wife.
verses.kjv: And Othniel the son of Kenaz, the brother of Caleb, took it: and he gave him Achsah his daughter to wife.
verses.bsb: So Othniel son of Caleb’s brother Kenaz captured the city, and Caleb gave his daughter Acsah to him in marriage.

verses.esv: When she came to him, she urged him to ask her father for a field. And she got off her donkey, and Caleb said to her, “What do you want?”
verses.kjv: And it came to pass, as she came unto him, that she moved him to ask of her father a field: and she lighted off her ass; and Caleb said unto her, What wouldest thou?
verses.bsb: One day Acsah came to Othniel and urged him to ask her father for a field. When she got off her donkey, Caleb asked her, “What do you desire?”

verses.esv: She said to him, “Give me a blessing. Since you have given me the land of the Negeb, give me also springs of water.” And he gave her the upper springs and the lower springs.
verses.kjv: Who answered, Give me a blessing; for thou hast given me a south land; give me also springs of water. And he gave her the upper springs, and the nether springs.
verses.bsb: “Give me a blessing,” she answered. “Since you have given me land in the Negev, give me springs of water as well.”  So Caleb gave her both the upper and lower springs.

verses.esv: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Judah according to their clans.
verses.kjv: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Judah according to their families.
verses.bsb: This is the inheritance of the clans of the tribe of Judah.

verses.esv: The cities belonging to the tribe of the people of Judah in the extreme south, toward the boundary of Edom, were Kabzeel, Eder, Jagur,
verses.kjv: And the uttermost cities of the tribe of the children of Judah toward the coast of Edom southward were Kabzeel, and Eder, and Jagur,
verses.bsb: These were the southernmost cities of the tribe of Judah in the Negev toward the border of Edom:

verses.esv: Kinah, Dimonah, Adadah,
verses.kjv: And Kinah, and Dimonah, and Adadah,
verses.bsb: Kabzeel, Eder, Jagur, Kinah, Dimonah, Adadah,

verses.esv: Kedesh, Hazor, Ithnan,
verses.kjv: And Kedesh, and Hazor, and Ithnan,
verses.bsb: Kedesh, Hazor, Ithnan,

verses.esv: Ziph, Telem, Bealoth,
verses.kjv: Ziph, and Telem, and Bealoth,
verses.bsb: Ziph, Telem, Bealoth,

verses.esv: Hazor-hadattah, Kerioth-hezron (that is, Hazor),
verses.kjv: And Hazor, Hadattah, and Kerioth, and Hezron, which is Hazor,
verses.bsb: Hazor-hadattah, Kerioth-hezron (that is, Hazor),

verses.esv: Amam, Shema, Moladah,
verses.kjv: Amam, and Shema, and Moladah,
verses.bsb: Amam, Shema, Moladah,

verses.esv: Hazar-gaddah, Heshmon, Beth-pelet,
verses.kjv: And Hazar-gaddah, and Heshmon, and Beth-palet,
verses.bsb: Hazar-gaddah, Heshmon, Beth-pelet,

verses.esv: Hazar-shual, Beersheba, Biziothiah,
verses.kjv: And Hazar-shual, and Beer-sheba, and Bizjothjah,
verses.bsb: Hazar-shual, Beersheba, Biziothiah,

verses.esv: Baalah, Iim, Ezem,
verses.kjv: Baalah, and Iim, and Azem,
verses.bsb: Baalah, Iim, Ezem,

verses.esv: Eltolad, Chesil, Hormah,
verses.kjv: And Eltolad, and Chesil, and Hormah,
verses.bsb: Eltolad, Chesil, Hormah,

verses.esv: Ziklag, Madmannah, Sansannah,
verses.kjv: And Ziklag, and Madmannah, and Sansannah,
verses.bsb: Ziklag, Madmannah, Sansannah,

verses.esv: Lebaoth, Shilhim, Ain, and Rimmon: in all, twenty-nine cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: And Lebaoth, and Shilhim, and Ain, and Rimmon: all the cities are twenty and nine, with their villages:
verses.bsb: Lebaoth, Shilhim, Ain, and Rimmon—twenty-nine cities in all, along with their villages.

verses.esv: And in the lowland, Eshtaol, Zorah, Ashnah,
verses.kjv: And in the valley, Eshtaol, and Zoreah, and Ashnah,
verses.bsb: These were in the foothills:

verses.esv: Zanoah, En-gannim, Tappuah, Enam,
verses.kjv: And Zanoah, and En-gannim, Tappuah, and Enam,
verses.bsb: Eshtaol, Zorah, Ashnah, Zanoah, En-gannim, Tappuah, Enam,

verses.esv: Jarmuth, Adullam, Socoh, Azekah,
verses.kjv: Jarmuth, and Adullam, Socoh, and Azekah,
verses.bsb: Jarmuth, Adullam, Socoh, Azekah,

verses.esv: Shaaraim, Adithaim, Gederah, Gederothaim: fourteen cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: And Sharaim, and Adithaim, and Gederah, and Gederothaim; fourteen cities with their villages:
verses.bsb: Shaaraim, Adithaim, and Gederah (or Gederothaim)—fourteen cities, along with their villages.

verses.esv: Zenan, Hadashah, Migdal-gad,
verses.kjv: Zenan, and Hadashah, and Migdal-gad,
verses.bsb: Zenan, Hadashah, Migdal-gad,

verses.esv: Dilean, Mizpeh, Joktheel,
verses.kjv: And Dilean, and Mizpeh, and Joktheel,
verses.bsb: Dilan, Mizpeh, Joktheel,

verses.esv: Lachish, Bozkath, Eglon,
verses.kjv: Lachish, and Bozkath, and Eglon,
verses.bsb: Lachish, Bozkath, Eglon,

verses.esv: Cabbon, Lahmam, Chitlish,
verses.kjv: And Cabbon, and Lahmam, and Kithlish,
verses.bsb: Cabbon, Lahmas, Chitlish,

verses.esv: Gederoth, Beth-dagon, Naamah, and Makkedah: sixteen cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: And Gederoth, Beth-dagon, and Naamah, and Makkedah; sixteen cities with their villages:
verses.bsb: Gederoth, Beth-dagon, Naamah, and Makkedah—sixteen cities, along with their villages.

verses.esv: Libnah, Ether, Ashan,
verses.kjv: Libnah, and Ether, and Ashan,
verses.bsb: Libnah, Ether, Ashan,

verses.esv: Iphtah, Ashnah, Nezib,
verses.kjv: And Jiphtah, and Ashnah, and Nezib,
verses.bsb: Iphtah, Ashnah, Nezib,

verses.esv: Keilah, Achzib, and Mareshah: nine cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: And Keilah, and Achzib, and Mareshah; nine cities with their villages:
verses.bsb: Keilah, Achzib, and Mareshah—nine cities, along with their villages.

verses.esv: Ekron, with its towns and its villages;
verses.kjv: Ekron, with her towns and her villages:
verses.bsb: Ekron, with its towns and villages;

verses.esv: from Ekron to the sea, all that were by the side of Ashdod, with their villages.
verses.kjv: From Ekron even unto the sea, all that lay near Ashdod, with their villages:
verses.bsb: from Ekron to the sea, all the cities near Ashdod, along with their villages;

verses.esv: Ashdod, its towns and its villages; Gaza, its towns and its villages; to the Brook of Egypt, and the Great Sea with its coastline.
verses.kjv: Ashdod with her towns and her villages, Gaza with her towns and her villages, unto the river of Egypt, and the great sea, and the border thereof:
verses.bsb: Ashdod, with its towns and villages; Gaza, with its towns and villages, as far as the Brook of Egypt and the coastline of the Great Sea.

verses.esv: And in the hill country, Shamir, Jattir, Socoh,
verses.kjv: ¶ And in the mountains, Shamir, and Jattir, and Socoh,
verses.bsb: These were in the hill country:

verses.esv: Dannah, Kiriath-sannah (that is, Debir),
verses.kjv: And Dannah, and Kirjath-sannah, which is Debir,
verses.bsb: Shamir, Jattir, Socoh, Dannah, Kiriath-sannah (that is, Debir),

verses.esv: Anab, Eshtemoh, Anim,
verses.kjv: And Anab, and Eshtemoh, and Anim,
verses.bsb: Anab, Eshtemoh, Anim,

verses.esv: Goshen, Holon, and Giloh: eleven cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: And Goshen, and Holon, and Giloh; eleven cities with their villages:
verses.bsb: Goshen, Holon, and Giloh—eleven cities, along with their villages.

verses.esv: Arab, Dumah, Eshan,
verses.kjv: Arab, and Dumah, and Eshean,
verses.bsb: Arab, Dumah, Eshan,

verses.esv: Janim, Beth-tappuah, Aphekah,
verses.kjv: And Janum, and Beth-tappuah, and Aphekah,
verses.bsb: Janim, Beth-tappuah, Aphekah,

verses.esv: Humtah, Kiriath-arba (that is, Hebron), and Zior: nine cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: And Humtah, and Kirjath-arba, which is Hebron, and Zior; nine cities with their villages:
verses.bsb: Humtah, Kiriath-arba (that is, Hebron), and Zior—nine cities, along with their villages.

verses.esv: Maon, Carmel, Ziph, Juttah,
verses.kjv: Maon, Carmel, and Ziph, and Juttah,
verses.bsb: Maon, Carmel, Ziph, Juttah,

verses.esv: Jezreel, Jokdeam, Zanoah,
verses.kjv: And Jezreel, and Jokdeam, and Zanoah,
verses.bsb: Jezreel, Jokdeam, Zanoah,

verses.esv: Kain, Gibeah, and Timnah: ten cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: Cain, Gibeah, and Timnah; ten cities with their villages:
verses.bsb: Kain, Gibeah, and Timnah—ten cities, along with their villages.

verses.esv: Halhul, Beth-zur, Gedor,
verses.kjv: Halhul, Beth-zur, and Gedor,
verses.bsb: Halhul, Beth-zur, Gedor,

verses.esv: Maarath, Beth-anoth, and Eltekon: six cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: And Maarath, and Beth-anoth, and Eltekon; six cities with their villages:
verses.bsb: Maarath, Beth-anoth, and Eltekon—six cities, along with their villages.

verses.esv: Kiriath-baal (that is, Kiriath-jearim), and Rabbah: two cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: Kirjath-baal, which is Kirjath-jearim, and Rabbah; two cities with their villages:
verses.bsb: Kiriath-baal (that is, Kiriath-jearim), and Rabbah—two cities, along with their villages.

verses.esv: In the wilderness, Beth-arabah, Middin, Secacah,
verses.kjv: In the wilderness, Beth-arabah, Middin, and Secacah,
verses.bsb: These were in the wilderness:

verses.esv: Nibshan, the City of Salt, and Engedi: six cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: And Nibshan, and the city of Salt, and En-gedi; six cities with their villages.
verses.bsb: Beth-arabah, Middin, Secacah, Nibshan, the City of Salt, and En-gedi—six cities, along with their villages.

verses.esv: But the Jebusites, the inhabitants of Jerusalem, the people of Judah could not drive out, so the Jebusites dwell with the people of Judah at Jerusalem to this day.
verses.kjv: ¶ As for the Jebusites the inhabitants of Jerusalem, the children of Judah could not drive them out: but the Jebusites dwell with the children of Judah at Jerusalem unto this day.
verses.bsb: But the descendants of Judah could not drive out the Jebusites living in Jerusalem. So to this day the Jebusites live there among the descendants of Judah.

verses.esv: The allotment of the people of Joseph went from the Jordan by Jericho, east of the waters of Jericho, into the wilderness, going up from Jericho into the hill country to Bethel.
verses.kjv: AND the lot of the children of Joseph fell from Jordan by Jericho, unto the water of Jericho on the east, to the wilderness that goeth up from Jericho throughout mount Beth-el,
verses.bsb: The allotment for the descendants of Joseph extended from the Jordan at Jericho to the waters of Jericho on the east, through the wilderness that goes up from Jericho into the hill country of Bethel.

verses.esv: Then going from Bethel to Luz, it passes along to Ataroth, the territory of the Archites.
verses.kjv: And goeth out from Beth-el to Luz, and passeth along unto the borders of Archi to Ataroth,
verses.bsb: It went on from Bethel (that is, Luz) and proceeded to the border of the Archites in Ataroth.

verses.esv: Then it goes down westward to the territory of the Japhletites, as far as the territory of Lower Beth-horon, then to Gezer, and it ends at the sea.
verses.kjv: And goeth down westward to the coast of Japhleti, unto the coast of Beth-horon the nether, and to Gezer: and the goings out thereof are at the sea.
verses.bsb: Then it descended westward to the border of the Japhletites as far as the border of Lower Beth-horon and on to Gezer, and it ended at the Sea.

verses.esv: The people of Joseph, Manasseh and Ephraim, received their inheritance.
verses.kjv: So the children of Joseph, Manasseh and Ephraim, took their inheritance.
verses.bsb: So Ephraim and Manasseh, the sons of Joseph, received their inheritance.

verses.esv: The territory of the people of Ephraim by their clans was as follows: the boundary of their inheritance on the east was Ataroth-addar as far as Upper Beth-horon,
verses.kjv: ¶ And the border of the children of Ephraim according to their families was thus: even the border of their inheritance on the east side was Ataroth-addar, unto Beth-horon the upper;
verses.bsb: This was the territory of the descendants of Ephraim by their clans:  The border of their inheritance went from Ataroth-addar in the east to Upper Beth-horon

verses.esv: and the boundary goes from there to the sea. On the north is Michmethath. Then on the east the boundary turns around toward Taanath-shiloh and passes along beyond it on the east to Janoah,
verses.kjv: And the border went out toward the sea to Michmethah on the north side; and the border went about eastward unto Taanath-shiloh, and passed by it on the east to Janohah;
verses.bsb: and out toward the Sea. From Michmethath on the north it turned eastward toward Taanath-shiloh and passed by it to Janoah on the east.

verses.esv: then it goes down from Janoah to Ataroth and to Naarah, and touches Jericho, ending at the Jordan.
verses.kjv: And it went down from Janohah to Ataroth, and to Naarath, and came to Jericho, and went out at Jordan.
verses.bsb: From Janoah it went down to Ataroth and Naarah, and then reached Jericho and came out at the Jordan.

verses.esv: From Tappuah the boundary goes westward to the brook Kanah and ends at the sea. Such is the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Ephraim by their clans,
verses.kjv: The border went out from Tappuah westward unto the river Kanah; and the goings out thereof were at the sea. This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Ephraim by their families.
verses.bsb: From Tappuah the border went westward to the Brook of Kanah and ended at the Sea.  This was the inheritance of the clans of the tribe of Ephraim,

verses.esv: together with the towns that were set apart for the people of Ephraim within the inheritance of the Manassites, all those towns with their villages.
verses.kjv: And the separate cities for the children of Ephraim were among the inheritance of the children of Manasseh, all the cities with their villages.
verses.bsb: along with all the cities and villages set apart for the descendants of Ephraim within the inheritance of Manasseh.

verses.esv: However, they did not drive out the Canaanites who lived in Gezer, so the Canaanites have lived in the midst of Ephraim to this day but have been made to do forced labor.
verses.kjv: And they drave not out the Canaanites that dwelt in Gezer: but the Canaanites dwell among the Ephraimites unto this day, and serve under tribute.
verses.bsb: But they did not drive out the Canaanites who lived in Gezer. So the Canaanites dwell among the Ephraimites to this day, but they are forced laborers.

verses.esv: Then allotment was made to the people of Manasseh, for he was the firstborn of Joseph. To Machir the firstborn of Manasseh, the father of Gilead, were allotted Gilead and Bashan, because he was a man of war.
verses.kjv: THERE was also a lot for the tribe of Manasseh; for he was the firstborn of Joseph; to wit, for Machir the firstborn of Manasseh, the father of Gilead: because he was a man of war, therefore he had Gilead and Bashan.
verses.bsb: Now this was the allotment for the tribe of Manasseh as Joseph’s firstborn son, namely for Machir the firstborn of Manasseh and father of the Gileadites, who had received Gilead and Bashan because Machir was a man of war.

verses.esv: And allotments were made to the rest of the people of Manasseh by their clans, Abiezer, Helek, Asriel, Shechem, Hepher, and Shemida. These were the male descendants of Manasseh the son of Joseph, by their clans.
verses.kjv: There was also a lot for the rest of the children of Manasseh by their families; for the children of Abiezer, and for the children of Helek, and for the children of Asriel, and for the children of Shechem, and for the children of Hepher, and for the children of Shemida: these were the male children of Manasseh the son of Joseph by their families.
verses.bsb: So this allotment was for the rest of the descendants of Manasseh—the clans of Abiezer, Helek, Asriel, Shechem, Hepher, and Shemida. These are the other male descendants of the clans of Manasseh son of Joseph.

verses.esv: Now Zelophehad the son of Hepher, son of Gilead, son of Machir, son of Manasseh, had no sons, but only daughters, and these are the names of his daughters: Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milcah, and Tirzah.
verses.kjv: ¶ But Zelophehad, the son of Hepher, the son of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh, had no sons, but daughters: and these are the names of his daughters, Mahlah, and Noah, Hoglah, Milcah, and Tirzah.
verses.bsb: But Zelophehad son of Hepher (the son of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh) had no sons but only daughters. These are the names of his daughters: Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milcah, and Tirzah.

verses.esv: They approached Eleazar the priest and Joshua the son of Nun and the leaders and said, “The LORD commanded Moses to give us an inheritance along with our brothers.” So according to the mouth of the LORD he gave them an inheritance among the brothers of their father.
verses.kjv: And they came near before Eleazar the priest, and before Joshua the son of Nun, and before the princes, saying, The Lord commanded Moses to give us an inheritance among our brethren. Therefore according to the commandment of the Lord he gave them an inheritance among the brethren of their father.
verses.bsb: They approached Eleazar the priest, Joshua son of Nun, and the leaders, and said, “The LORD commanded Moses to give us an inheritance among our brothers.”  So Joshua gave them an inheritance among their father’s brothers, in keeping with the command of the LORD.

verses.esv: Thus there fell to Manasseh ten portions, besides the land of Gilead and Bashan, which is on the other side of the Jordan,
verses.kjv: And there fell ten portions to Manasseh, beside the land of Gilead and Bashan, which were on the other side Jordan;
verses.bsb: Thus ten shares fell to Manasseh, in addition to the land of Gilead and Bashan beyond the Jordan,

verses.esv: because the daughters of Manasseh received an inheritance along with his sons. The land of Gilead was allotted to the rest of the people of Manasseh.
verses.kjv: Because the daughters of Manasseh had an inheritance among his sons: and the rest of Manasseh’s sons had the land of Gilead.
verses.bsb: because the daughters of Manasseh received an inheritance among his sons. And the land of Gilead belonged to the rest of the sons of Manasseh.

verses.esv: The territory of Manasseh reached from Asher to Michmethath, which is east of Shechem. Then the boundary goes along southward to the inhabitants of En-tappuah.
verses.kjv: ¶ And the coast of Manasseh was from Asher to Michmethah, that lieth before Shechem; and the border went along on the right hand unto the inhabitants of En-tappuah.
verses.bsb: Now the border of Manasseh went from Asher to Michmethath near Shechem, then southward to include the inhabitants of En-tappuah.

verses.esv: The land of Tappuah belonged to Manasseh, but the town of Tappuah on the boundary of Manasseh belonged to the people of Ephraim.
verses.kjv: Now Manasseh had the land of Tappuah: but Tappuah on the border of Manasseh belonged to the children of Ephraim;
verses.bsb: The region of Tappuah belonged to Manasseh, but Tappuah itself, on the border of Manasseh, belonged to Ephraim.

verses.esv: Then the boundary went down to the brook Kanah. These cities, to the south of the brook, among the cities of Manasseh, belong to Ephraim. Then the boundary of Manasseh goes on the north side of the brook and ends at the sea,
verses.kjv: And the coast descended unto the river Kanah, southward of the river: these cities of Ephraim are among the cities of Manasseh: the coast of Manasseh also was on the north side of the river, and the outgoings of it were at the sea:
verses.bsb: From there the border continued southward to the Brook of Kanah. There were cities belonging to Ephraim among the cities of Manasseh, but the border of Manasseh was on the north side of the brook and ended at the Sea.

verses.esv: the land to the south being Ephraim's and that to the north being Manasseh's, with the sea forming its boundary. On the north Asher is reached, and on the east Issachar.
verses.kjv: Southward it was Ephraim’s, and northward it was Manasseh’s, and the sea is his border; and they met together in Asher on the north, and in Issachar on the east.
verses.bsb: Ephraim’s territory was to the south, and Manasseh’s was to the north, having the Sea as its border and adjoining Asher on the north and Issachar on the east.

verses.esv: Also in Issachar and in Asher Manasseh had Beth-shean and its villages, and Ibleam and its villages, and the inhabitants of Dor and its villages, and the inhabitants of En-dor and its villages, and the inhabitants of Taanach and its villages, and the inhabitants of Megiddo and its villages; the third is Naphath.
verses.kjv: And Manasseh had in Issachar and in Asher Beth-shean and her towns, and Ibleam and her towns, and the inhabitants of Dor and her towns, and the inhabitants of Endor and her towns, and the inhabitants of Taanach and her towns, and the inhabitants of Megiddo and her towns, even three countries.
verses.bsb: Within Issachar and Asher, Manasseh was assigned Beth-shean, Ibleam, Dor (that is, Naphath), Endor, Taanach, and Megiddo, each with their surrounding settlements.

verses.esv: Yet the people of Manasseh could not take possession of those cities, but the Canaanites persisted in dwelling in that land.
verses.kjv: Yet the children of Manasseh could not drive out the inhabitants of those cities; but the Canaanites would dwell in that land.
verses.bsb: But the descendants of Manasseh were unable to occupy these cities, because the Canaanites were determined to stay in this land.

verses.esv: Now when the people of Israel grew strong, they put the Canaanites to forced labor, but did not utterly drive them out.
verses.kjv: Yet it came to pass, when the children of Israel were waxen strong, that they put the Canaanites to tribute; but did not utterly drive them out.
verses.bsb: However, when the Israelites grew stronger, they put the Canaanites to forced labor; but they failed to drive them out completely.

verses.esv: Then the people of Joseph spoke to Joshua, saying, “Why have you given me but one lot and one portion as an inheritance, although I am a numerous people, since all along the LORD has blessed me?”
verses.kjv: And the children of Joseph spake unto Joshua, saying, Why hast thou given me but one lot and one portion to inherit, seeing I am a great people, forasmuch as the Lord hath blessed me hitherto?
verses.bsb: Then the sons of Joseph said to Joshua, “Why have you given us only one portion as an inheritance? We have many people, because the LORD has blessed us abundantly.”

verses.esv: And Joshua said to them, “If you are a numerous people, go up by yourselves to the forest, and there clear ground for yourselves in the land of the Perizzites and the Rephaim, since the hill country of Ephraim is too narrow for you.”
verses.kjv: And Joshua answered them, If thou be a great people, then get thee up to the wood country, and cut down for thyself there in the land of the Perizzites and of the giants, if mount Ephraim be too narrow for thee.
verses.bsb: Joshua answered them, “If you have so many people that the hill country of Ephraim is too small for you, go to the forest and clear for yourself an area in the land of the Perizzites and the Rephaim.”

verses.esv: The people of Joseph said, “The hill country is not enough for us. Yet all the Canaanites who dwell in the plain have chariots of iron, both those in Beth-shean and its villages and those in the Valley of Jezreel.”
verses.kjv: And the children of Joseph said, The hill is not enough for us: and all the Canaanites that dwell in the land of the valley have chariots of iron, both they who are of Beth-shean and her towns, and they who are of the valley of Jezreel.
verses.bsb: “The hill country is not enough for us,” they replied, “and all the Canaanites who live in the valley have iron chariots, both in Beth-shean with its towns and in the Valley of Jezreel.”

verses.esv: Then Joshua said to the house of Joseph, to Ephraim and Manasseh, “You are a numerous people and have great power. You shall not have one allotment only,
verses.kjv: And Joshua spake unto the house of Joseph, even to Ephraim and to Manasseh, saying, Thou art a great people, and hast great power: thou shalt not have one lot only:
verses.bsb: So Joshua said to the house of Joseph—to Ephraim and Manasseh—“You have many people and great strength. You shall not have just one allotment,

verses.esv: but the hill country shall be yours, for though it is a forest, you shall clear it and possess it to its farthest borders. For you shall drive out the Canaanites, though they have chariots of iron, and though they are strong.”
verses.kjv: But the mountain shall be thine; for it is a wood, and thou shalt cut it down: and the outgoings of it shall be thine: for thou shalt drive out the Canaanites, though they have iron chariots, and though they be strong.
verses.bsb: because the hill country will be yours as well. It is a forest; clear it, and its farthest limits will be yours. Although the Canaanites have iron chariots and although they are strong, you can drive them out.”

verses.esv: Then the whole congregation of the people of Israel assembled at Shiloh and set up the tent of meeting there. The land lay subdued before them.
verses.kjv: AND the whole congregation of the children of Israel assembled together at Shiloh, and set up the tabernacle of the congregation there. And the land was subdued before them.
verses.bsb: Then the whole congregation of Israel assembled at Shiloh and set up the Tent of Meeting there. And though the land was subdued before them,

verses.esv: There remained among the people of Israel seven tribes whose inheritance had not yet been apportioned.
verses.kjv: And there remained among the children of Israel seven tribes, which had not yet received their inheritance.
verses.bsb: there were still seven tribes of Israel who had not yet received their inheritance.

verses.esv: So Joshua said to the people of Israel, “How long will you put off going in to take possession of the land, which the LORD, the God of your fathers, has given you?
verses.kjv: And Joshua said unto the children of Israel, How long are ye slack to go to possess the land, which the Lord God of your fathers hath given you?
verses.bsb: So Joshua said to the Israelites, “How long will you put off entering and possessing the land that the LORD, the God of your fathers, has given you?

verses.esv: Provide three men from each tribe, and I will send them out that they may set out and go up and down the land. They shall write a description of it with a view to their inheritances, and then come to me.
verses.kjv: Give out from among you three men for each tribe: and I will send them, and they shall rise, and go through the land, and describe it according to the inheritance of them; and they shall come again to me.
verses.bsb: Appoint three men from each tribe, and I will send them out to survey the land and map it out, according to the inheritance of each. Then they will return to me

verses.esv: They shall divide it into seven portions. Judah shall continue in his territory on the south, and the house of Joseph shall continue in their territory on the north.
verses.kjv: And they shall divide it into seven parts: Judah shall abide in their coast on the south, and the house of Joseph shall abide in their coasts on the north.
verses.bsb: and divide the land into seven portions. Judah shall remain in their territory in the south, and the house of Joseph shall remain in their territory in the north.

verses.esv: And you shall describe the land in seven divisions and bring the description here to me. And I will cast lots for you here before the LORD our God.
verses.kjv: Ye shall therefore describe the land into seven parts, and bring the description hither to me, that I may cast lots for you here before the Lord our God.
verses.bsb: When you have mapped out the seven portions of land and brought it to me, I will cast lots for you here in the presence of the LORD our God.

verses.esv: The Levites have no portion among you, for the priesthood of the LORD is their heritage. And Gad and Reuben and half the tribe of Manasseh have received their inheritance beyond the Jordan eastward, which Moses the servant of the LORD gave them.”
verses.kjv: But the Levites have no part among you; for the priesthood of the Lord is their inheritance: and Gad, and Reuben, and half the tribe of Manasseh, have received their inheritance beyond Jordan on the east, which Moses the servant of the Lord gave them.
verses.bsb: The Levites, however, have no portion among you, because their inheritance is the priesthood of the LORD. And Gad, Reuben, and half the tribe of Manasseh have already received the inheritance that Moses the servant of the LORD gave them beyond the Jordan to the east.”

verses.esv: So the men arose and went, and Joshua charged those who went to write the description of the land, saying, “Go up and down in the land and write a description and return to me. And I will cast lots for you here before the LORD in Shiloh.”
verses.kjv: ¶ And the men arose, and went away: and Joshua charged them that went to describe the land, saying, Go and walk through the land, and describe it, and come again to me, that I may here cast lots for you before the Lord in Shiloh.
verses.bsb: As the men got up to go out, Joshua commanded them to map out the land, saying, “Go and survey the land, map it out, and return to me. Then I will cast lots for you here in Shiloh in the presence of the LORD.”

verses.esv: So the men went and passed up and down in the land and wrote in a book a description of it by towns in seven divisions. Then they came to Joshua to the camp at Shiloh,
verses.kjv: And the men went and passed through the land, and described it by cities into seven parts in a book, and came again to Joshua to the host at Shiloh.
verses.bsb: So the men departed and went throughout the land, mapping it city by city into seven portions. Then they returned with the document to Joshua at the camp in Shiloh.

verses.esv: and Joshua cast lots for them in Shiloh before the LORD. And there Joshua apportioned the land to the people of Israel, to each his portion.
verses.kjv: ¶ And Joshua cast lots for them in Shiloh before the Lord: and there Joshua divided the land unto the children of Israel according to their divisions.
verses.bsb: And Joshua cast lots for them in the presence of the LORD at Shiloh, where he distributed the land to the Israelites according to their divisions.

verses.esv: The lot of the tribe of the people of Benjamin according to its clans came up, and the territory allotted to it fell between the people of Judah and the people of Joseph.
verses.kjv: ¶ And the lot of the tribe of the children of Benjamin came up according to their families: and the coast of their lot came forth between the children of Judah and the children of Joseph.
verses.bsb: The first lot came up for the clans of the tribe of Benjamin. Their allotted territory lay between the tribes of Judah and Joseph:

verses.esv: On the north side their boundary began at the Jordan. Then the boundary goes up to the shoulder north of Jericho, then up through the hill country westward, and it ends at the wilderness of Beth-aven.
verses.kjv: And their border on the north side was from Jordan; and the border went up to the side of Jericho on the north side, and went up through the mountains westward; and the goings out thereof were at the wilderness of Beth-aven.
verses.bsb: On the north side their border began at the Jordan, went up past the northern slope of Jericho, headed west through the hill country, and came out at the wilderness of Beth-aven.

verses.esv: From there the boundary passes along southward in the direction of Luz, to the shoulder of Luz (that is, Bethel), then the boundary goes down to Ataroth-addar, on the mountain that lies south of Lower Beth-horon.
verses.kjv: And the border went over from thence toward Luz, to the side of Luz, which is Beth-el, southward; and the border descended to Ataroth-adar, near the hill that lieth on the south side of the nether Beth-horon.
verses.bsb: From there the border crossed over to the southern slope of Luz (that is, Bethel) and went down to Ataroth-addar on the hill south of Lower Beth-horon.

verses.esv: Then the boundary goes in another direction, turning on the western side southward from the mountain that lies to the south, opposite Beth-horon, and it ends at Kiriath-baal (that is, Kiriath-jearim), a city belonging to the people of Judah. This forms the western side.
verses.kjv: And the border was drawn thence, and compassed the corner of the sea southward, from the hill that lieth before Beth-horon southward; and the goings out thereof were at Kirjath-baal, which is Kirjath-jearim, a city of the children of Judah: this was the west quarter.
verses.bsb: On the west side the border curved southward from the hill facing Beth-horon on the south and came out at Kiriath-baal (that is, Kiriath-jearim), a city of the sons of Judah. This was the western side.

verses.esv: And the southern side begins at the outskirts of Kiriath-jearim. And the boundary goes from there to Ephron, to the spring of the waters of Nephtoah.
verses.kjv: And the south quarter was from the end of Kirjath-jearim, and the border went out on the west, and went out to the well of waters of Nephtoah:
verses.bsb: On the south side the border began at the outskirts of Kiriath-jearim and extended westward to the spring at the Waters of Nephtoah.

verses.esv: Then the boundary goes down to the border of the mountain that overlooks the Valley of the Son of Hinnom, which is at the north end of the Valley of Rephaim. And it then goes down the Valley of Hinnom, south of the shoulder of the Jebusites, and downward to En-rogel.
verses.kjv: And the border came down to the end of the mountain that lieth before the valley of the son of Hinnom, and which is in the valley of the giants on the north, and descended to the valley of Hinnom, to the side of Jebusi on the south, and descended to En-rogel,
verses.bsb: Then it went down to the foot of the hill that faces the Valley of Hinnom at the northern end of the Valley of Rephaim and ran down the Valley of Hinnom toward the southern slope of the Jebusites and downward to En-rogel.

verses.esv: Then it bends in a northerly direction going on to En-shemesh, and from there goes to Geliloth, which is opposite the ascent of Adummim. Then it goes down to the stone of Bohan the son of Reuben,
verses.kjv: And was drawn from the north, and went forth to En-shemesh, and went forth toward Geliloth, which is over against the going up of Adummim, and descended to the stone of Bohan the son of Reuben,
verses.bsb: From there it curved northward and proceeded to En-shemesh and on to Geliloth facing the Ascent of Adummim, and continued down to the Stone of Bohan son of Reuben.

verses.esv: and passing on to the north of the shoulder of Beth-arabah it goes down to the Arabah.
verses.kjv: And passed along toward the side over against Arabah northward, and went down unto Arabah:
verses.bsb: Then it went on to the northern slope of Beth-arabah and went down into the valley.

verses.esv: Then the boundary passes on to the north of the shoulder of Beth-hoglah. And the boundary ends at the northern bay of the Salt Sea, at the south end of the Jordan: this is the southern border.
verses.kjv: And the border passed along to the side of Beth-hoglah northward: and the outgoings of the border were at the north bay of the salt sea at the south end of Jordan: this was the south coast.
verses.bsb: The border continued to the northern slope of Beth-hoglah and came out at the northern bay of the Salt Sea, at the mouth of the Jordan. This was the southern border.

verses.esv: The Jordan forms its boundary on the eastern side. This is the inheritance of the people of Benjamin, according to their clans, boundary by boundary all around.
verses.kjv: And Jordan was the border of it on the east side. This was the inheritance of the children of Benjamin, by the coasts thereof round about, according to their families.
verses.bsb: On the east side the border was the Jordan.   These were the borders around the inheritance of the clans of the tribe of Benjamin.

verses.esv: Now the cities of the tribe of the people of Benjamin according to their clans were Jericho, Beth-hoglah, Emek-keziz,
verses.kjv: Now the cities of the tribe of the children of Benjamin according to their families were Jericho, and Beth-hoglah, and the valley of Keziz,
verses.bsb: These were the cities of the clans of the tribe of Benjamin:

verses.esv: Beth-arabah, Zemaraim, Bethel,
verses.kjv: And Beth-arabah, and Zemaraim, and Beth-el,
verses.bsb: Jericho, Beth-hoglah, Emek-keziz, Beth-arabah, Zemaraim, Bethel,

verses.esv: Avvim, Parah, Ophrah,
verses.kjv: And Avim, and Parah, and Ophrah,
verses.bsb: Avvim, Parah, Ophrah,

verses.esv: Chephar-ammoni, Ophni, Geba—twelve cities with their villages:
verses.kjv: And Chephar-haammonai, and Ophni, and Gaba; twelve cities with their villages:
verses.bsb: Chephar-ammoni, Ophni, and Geba—twelve cities, along with their villages.

verses.esv: Gibeon, Ramah, Beeroth,
verses.kjv: Gibeon, and Ramah, and Beeroth,
verses.bsb: Gibeon, Ramah, Beeroth,

verses.esv: Mizpeh, Chephirah, Mozah,
verses.kjv: And Mizpeh, and Chephirah, and Mozah,
verses.bsb: Mizpeh, Chephirah, Mozah,

verses.esv: Rekem, Irpeel, Taralah,
verses.kjv: And Rekem, and Irpeel, and Taralah,
verses.bsb: Rekem, Irpeel, Taralah,

verses.esv: Zela, Haeleph, Jebus (that is, Jerusalem), Gibeah and Kiriath-jearim—fourteen cities with their villages. This is the inheritance of the people of Benjamin according to its clans.
verses.kjv: And Zelah, Eleph, and Jebusi, which is Jerusalem, Gibeath, and Kirjath; fourteen cities with their villages. This is the inheritance of the children of Benjamin according to their families.
verses.bsb: Zelah, Haeleph, Jebus (that is, Jerusalem), Gibeah, and Kiriath-jearim—fourteen cities, along with their villages.   This was the inheritance of the clans of the tribe of Benjamin.

verses.esv: The second lot came out for Simeon, for the tribe of the people of Simeon, according to their clans, and their inheritance was in the midst of the inheritance of the people of Judah.
verses.kjv: AND the second lot came forth to Simeon, even for the tribe of the children of Simeon according to their families: and their inheritance was within the inheritance of the children of Judah.
verses.bsb: The second lot came out for the clans of the tribe of Simeon:

verses.esv: And they had for their inheritance Beersheba, Sheba, Moladah,
verses.kjv: And they had in their inheritance Beer-sheba, or Sheba, and Moladah,
verses.bsb: Their inheritance lay within the territory of Judah and included Beersheba (or Sheba), Moladah,

verses.esv: Hazar-shual, Balah, Ezem,
verses.kjv: And Hazar-shual, and Balah, and Azem,
verses.bsb: Hazar-shual, Balah, Ezem,

verses.esv: Eltolad, Bethul, Hormah,
verses.kjv: And Eltolad, and Bethul, and Hormah,
verses.bsb: Eltolad, Bethul, Hormah,

verses.esv: Ziklag, Beth-marcaboth, Hazar-susah,
verses.kjv: And Ziklag, and Beth-marcaboth, and Hazar-susah,
verses.bsb: Ziklag, Beth-marcaboth, Hazar-susah,

verses.esv: Beth-lebaoth, and Sharuhen—thirteen cities with their villages;
verses.kjv: And Beth-lebaoth, and Sharuhen; thirteen cities and their villages:
verses.bsb: Beth-lebaoth, and Sharuhen—thirteen cities, along with their villages.

verses.esv: Ain, Rimmon, Ether, and Ashan—four cities with their villages,
verses.kjv: Ain, Remmon, and Ether, and Ashan; four cities and their villages:
verses.bsb: Ain, Rimmon, Ether, and Ashan—four cities, along with their villages,

verses.esv: together with all the villages around these cities as far as Baalath-beer, Ramah of the Negeb. This was the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Simeon according to their clans.
verses.kjv: And all the villages that were round about these cities to Baalath-beer, Ramath of the south. This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Simeon according to their families.
verses.bsb: and all the villages surrounding these cities as far as Baalath-beer (Ramah of the Negev).   This was the inheritance of the clans of the tribe of Simeon.

verses.esv: The inheritance of the people of Simeon formed part of the territory of the people of Judah. Because the portion of the people of Judah was too large for them, the people of Simeon obtained an inheritance in the midst of their inheritance.
verses.kjv: Out of the portion of the children of Judah was the inheritance of the children of Simeon: for the part of the children of Judah was too much for them: therefore the children of Simeon had their inheritance within the inheritance of them.
verses.bsb: The inheritance of the Simeonites was taken from the territory of Judah, because the share for Judah’s descendants was too large for them. So the Simeonites received an inheritance within Judah’s portion.

verses.esv: The third lot came up for the people of Zebulun, according to their clans. And the territory of their inheritance reached as far as Sarid.
verses.kjv: ¶ And the third lot came up for the children of Zebulun according to their families: and the border of their inheritance was unto Sarid:
verses.bsb: The third lot came up for the clans of the tribe of Zebulun:

verses.esv: Then their boundary goes up westward and on to Mareal and touches Dabbesheth, then the brook that is east of Jokneam.
verses.kjv: And their border went up toward the sea, and Maralah, and reached to Dabbasheth, and reached to the river that is before Jokneam;
verses.bsb: The border of their inheritance stretched as far as Sarid. It went up westward to Maralah, reached Dabbesheth, and met the brook east of Jokneam.

verses.esv: From Sarid it goes in the other direction eastward toward the sunrise to the boundary of Chisloth-tabor. From there it goes to Daberath, then up to Japhia.
verses.kjv: And turned from Sarid eastward toward the sunrising unto the border of Chisloth-tabor, and then goeth out to Daberath, and goeth up to Japhia,
verses.bsb: From Sarid it turned eastward along the border of Chisloth-tabor and went on to Daberath and up to Japhia.

verses.esv: From there it passes along on the east toward the sunrise to Gath-hepher, to Eth-kazin, and going on to Rimmon it bends toward Neah,
verses.kjv: And from thence passeth on along on the east to Gittah-hepher, to Ittah-kazin, and goeth out to Remmon-methoar to Neah;
verses.bsb: From there it crossed eastward to Gath-hepher and to Eth-kazin; it extended to Rimmon and curved around toward Neah.

verses.esv: then on the north the boundary turns about to Hannathon, and it ends at the Valley of Iphtahel;
verses.kjv: And the border compasseth it on the north side to Hannathon: and the outgoings thereof are in the valley of Jiphthah-el:
verses.bsb: Then the border circled around the north side of Neah to Hannathon and ended at the Valley of Iphtah-el.

verses.esv: and Kattath, Nahalal, Shimron, Idalah, and Bethlehem—twelve cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: And Kattath, and Nahallal, and Shimron, and Idalah, and Beth-lehem: twelve cities with their villages.
verses.bsb: It also included Kattath, Nahalal, Shimron, Idalah, and Bethlehem. There were twelve cities, along with their villages.

verses.esv: This is the inheritance of the people of Zebulun, according to their clans—these cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: This is the inheritance of the children of Zebulun according to their families, these cities with their villages.
verses.bsb: This was the inheritance of the clans of the tribe of Zebulun, including these cities and their villages.

verses.esv: The fourth lot came out for Issachar, for the people of Issachar, according to their clans.
verses.kjv: ¶ And the fourth lot came out to Issachar, for the children of Issachar according to their families.
verses.bsb: The fourth lot came out for the clans of the tribe of Issachar:

verses.esv: Their territory included Jezreel, Chesulloth, Shunem,
verses.kjv: And their border was toward Jezreel, and Chesulloth, and Shunem,
verses.bsb: Their territory included Jezreel, Chesulloth, Shunem,

verses.esv: Hapharaim, Shion, Anaharath,
verses.kjv: And Hapharaim, and Shion, and Anaharath,
verses.bsb: Hapharaim, Shion, Anaharath,

verses.esv: Rabbith, Kishion, Ebez,
verses.kjv: And Rabbith, and Kishion, and Abez,
verses.bsb: Rabbith, Kishion, Ebez,

verses.esv: Remeth, En-gannim, En-haddah, Beth-pazzez.
verses.kjv: And Remeth, and En-gannim, and En-haddah, and Beth-pazzez;
verses.bsb: Remeth, En-gannim, En-haddah, and Beth-pazzez.

verses.esv: The boundary also touches Tabor, Shahazumah, and Beth-shemesh, and its boundary ends at the Jordan—sixteen cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: And the coast reacheth to Tabor, and Shahazimah, and Beth-shemesh; and the outgoings of their border were at Jordan: sixteen cities with their villages.
verses.bsb: The border reached Tabor, Shahazumah, and Beth-shemesh, and ended at the Jordan. There were sixteen cities, along with their villages.

verses.esv: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Issachar, according to their clans—the cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Issachar according to their families, the cities and their villages.
verses.bsb: This was the inheritance of the clans of the tribe of Issachar, including these cities and their villages.

verses.esv: The fifth lot came out for the tribe of the people of Asher according to their clans.
verses.kjv: ¶ And the fifth lot came out for the tribe of the children of Asher according to their families.
verses.bsb: The fifth lot came out for the clans of the tribe of Asher:

verses.esv: Their territory included Helkath, Hali, Beten, Achshaph,
verses.kjv: And their border was Helkath, and Hali, and Beten, and Achshaph,
verses.bsb: Their territory included Helkath, Hali, Beten, Achshaph,

verses.esv: Allammelech, Amad, and Mishal. On the west it touches Carmel and Shihor-libnath,
verses.kjv: And Alammelech, and Amad, and Misheal; and reacheth to Carmel westward, and to Shihor-libnath;
verses.bsb: Allammelech, Amad, and Mishal. On the west the border touched Carmel and Shihor-libnath,

verses.esv: then it turns eastward, it goes to Beth-dagon, and touches Zebulun and the Valley of Iphtahel northward to Beth-emek and Neiel. Then it continues in the north to Cabul,
verses.kjv: And turneth toward the sunrising to Beth-dagon, and reacheth to Zebulun, and to the valley of Jiphthah-el toward the north side of Beth-emek, and Neiel, and goeth out to Cabul on the left hand,
verses.bsb: then turned eastward toward Beth-dagon, touched Zebulun and the Valley of Iphtah-el, and went north to Beth-emek and Neiel, passing Cabul on the left.

verses.esv: Ebron, Rehob, Hammon, Kanah, as far as Sidon the Great.
verses.kjv: And Hebron, and Rehob, and Hammon, and Kanah, even unto great Zidon;
verses.bsb: It went on to Ebron, Rehob, Hammon, and Kanah, as far as Greater Sidon.

verses.esv: Then the boundary turns to Ramah, reaching to the fortified city of Tyre. Then the boundary turns to Hosah, and it ends at the sea; Mahalab, Achzib,
verses.kjv: And then the coast turneth to Ramah, and to the strong city Tyre; and the coast turneth to Hosah; and the outgoings thereof are at the sea from the coast to Achzib:
verses.bsb: The border then turned back toward Ramah as far as the fortified city of Tyre, turned toward Hosah, and came out at the Sea in the region of Achzib,

verses.esv: Ummah, Aphek and Rehob—twenty-two cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: Ummah also, and Aphek, and Rehob: twenty and two cities with their villages.
verses.bsb: Ummah, Aphek, and Rehob. There were twenty-two cities, along with their villages.

verses.esv: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Asher according to their clans—these cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Asher according to their families, these cities with their villages.
verses.bsb: This was the inheritance of the clans of the tribe of Asher, including these cities and their villages.

verses.esv: The sixth lot came out for the people of Naphtali, for the people of Naphtali, according to their clans.
verses.kjv: ¶ The sixth lot came out to the children of Naphtali, even for the children of Naphtali according to their families.
verses.bsb: The sixth lot came out for the clans of the tribe of Naphtali:

verses.esv: And their boundary ran from Heleph, from the oak in Zaanannim, and Adami-nekeb, and Jabneel, as far as Lakkum, and it ended at the Jordan.
verses.kjv: And their coast was from Heleph, from Allon to Zaanannim, and Adami, Nekeb, and Jabneel, unto Lakum; and the outgoings thereof were at Jordan:
verses.bsb: Their border started at Heleph and the great tree of Zaanannim, passing Adami-nekeb and Jabneel as far as Lakkum and ending at the Jordan.

verses.esv: Then the boundary turns westward to Aznoth-tabor and goes from there to Hukkok, touching Zebulun at the south and Asher on the west and Judah on the east at the Jordan.
verses.kjv: And then the coast turneth westward to Aznoth-tabor, and goeth out from thence to Hukkok, and reacheth to Zebulun on the south side, and reacheth to Asher on the west side, and to Judah upon Jordan toward the sunrising.
verses.bsb: Then the border turned westward to Aznoth-tabor and ran from there to Hukkok, touching Zebulun on the south side, Asher on the west, and Judah at the Jordan on the east.

verses.esv: The fortified cities are Ziddim, Zer, Hammath, Rakkath, Chinnereth,
verses.kjv: And the fenced cities are Ziddim, Zer, and Hammath, Rakkath, and Chinnereth,
verses.bsb: The fortified cities were Ziddim, Zer, Hammath, Rakkath, Chinnereth,

verses.esv: Adamah, Ramah, Hazor,
verses.kjv: And Adamah, and Ramah, and Hazor,
verses.bsb: Adamah, Ramah, Hazor,

verses.esv: Kedesh, Edrei, En-hazor,
verses.kjv: And Kedesh, and Edrei, and En-hazor,
verses.bsb: Kedesh, Edrei, En-hazor,

verses.esv: Yiron, Migdal-el, Horem, Beth-anath, and Beth-shemesh—nineteen cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: And Iron, and Migdal-el, Horem, and Beth-anath, and Beth-shemesh; nineteen cities with their villages.
verses.bsb: Iron, Migdal-el, Horem, Beth-anath, and Beth-shemesh. There were nineteen cities, along with their villages.

verses.esv: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Naphtali according to their clans—the cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Naphtali according to their families, the cities and their villages.
verses.bsb: This was the inheritance of the clans of the tribe of Naphtali, including these cities and their villages.

verses.esv: The seventh lot came out for the tribe of the people of Dan, according to their clans.
verses.kjv: ¶ And the seventh lot came out for the tribe of the children of Dan according to their families.
verses.bsb: The seventh lot came out for the clans of the tribe of Dan:

verses.esv: And the territory of its inheritance included Zorah, Eshtaol, Ir-shemesh,
verses.kjv: And the coast of their inheritance was Zorah, and Eshtaol, and Ir-shemesh,
verses.bsb: The territory of their inheritance included Zorah, Eshtaol, Ir-shemesh,

verses.esv: Shaalabbin, Aijalon, Ithlah,
verses.kjv: And Shaalabbin, and Ajalon, and Jethlah,
verses.bsb: Shaalabbin, Aijalon, Ithlah,

verses.esv: Elon, Timnah, Ekron,
verses.kjv: And Elon, and Thimnathah, and Ekron,
verses.bsb: Elon, Timnah, Ekron,

verses.esv: Eltekeh, Gibbethon, Baalath,
verses.kjv: And Eltekeh, and Gibbethon, and Baalath,
verses.bsb: Eltekeh, Gibbethon, Baalath,

verses.esv: Jehud, Bene-berak, Gath-rimmon,
verses.kjv: And Jehud, and Bene-berak, and Gath-rimmon,
verses.bsb: Jehud, Bene-berak, Gath-rimmon,

verses.esv: and Me-jarkon and Rakkon with the territory over against Joppa.
verses.kjv: And Me-jarkon, and Rakkon, with the border before Japho.
verses.bsb: Me-jarkon, and Rakkon, including the territory across from Joppa.

verses.esv: When the territory of the people of Dan was lost to them, the people of Dan went up and fought against Leshem, and after capturing it and striking it with the sword they took possession of it and settled in it, calling Leshem, Dan, after the name of Dan their ancestor.
verses.kjv: And the coast of the children of Dan went out too little for them: therefore the children of Dan went up to fight against Leshem, and took it, and smote it with the edge of the sword, and possessed it, and dwelt therein, and called Leshem, Dan, after the name of Dan their father.
verses.bsb: (Later, when the territory of the Danites was lost to them, they went up and fought against Leshem, captured it, and put it to the sword. So they took possession of Leshem, settled there, and renamed it after their father Dan.)

verses.esv: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Dan, according to their clans—these cities with their villages.
verses.kjv: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the children of Dan according to their families, these cities with their villages.
verses.bsb: This was the inheritance of the clans of the tribe of Dan, including these cities and their villages.

verses.esv: When they had finished distributing the several territories of the land as inheritances, the people of Israel gave an inheritance among them to Joshua the son of Nun.
verses.kjv: ¶ When they had made an end of dividing the land for inheritance by their coasts, the children of Israel gave an inheritance to Joshua the son of Nun among them:
verses.bsb: When they had finished distributing the land into its territories, the Israelites gave Joshua son of Nun an inheritance among them,

verses.esv: By command of the LORD they gave him the city that he asked, Timnath-serah in the hill country of Ephraim. And he rebuilt the city and settled in it.
verses.kjv: According to the word of the Lord they gave him the city which he asked, even Timnath-serah in mount Ephraim: and he built the city, and dwelt therein.
verses.bsb: as the LORD had commanded. They gave him the city of Timnath-serah in the hill country of Ephraim, as he requested. He rebuilt the city and settled in it.

verses.esv: These are the inheritances that Eleazar the priest and Joshua the son of Nun and the heads of the fathers' houses of the tribes of the people of Israel distributed by lot at Shiloh before the LORD, at the entrance of the tent of meeting. So they finished dividing the land.
verses.kjv: These are the inheritances, which Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun, and the heads of the fathers of the tribes of the children of Israel, divided for an inheritance by lot in Shiloh before the Lord, at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation. So they made an end of dividing the country.
